# seerr_blocklist (Resource)

Manage manual Seerr blocklist entries via `/api/v1/blocklist`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "seerr_blocklist" "example" {
  tmdb_id    = 438631
  media_type = "movie"
  title      = "Dune"
  user_id    = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `media_type` (String)
- `tmdb_id` (Number)
- `user_id` (Number) User ID recorded as the actor who manually blocklisted this media.

### Optional

- `blocklisted_tags` (String)
- `title` (String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import seerr_blocklist.example movie:438631
```
